projects.title: Garden Cat
projects.description: A tuxedo cat finds its place among pink blossoms. Part of a series celebrating the quiet companionship between domestic animals and the gardens they inhabit.

projects.title: Afternoon Rest
projects.description: Warm afternoon light spills across a scene of quiet leisure. The interplay of houseplants and soft furnishings creates an intimate portrait of everyday comfort.

projects.title: Rolling Hills
projects.description: A whimsical landscape where a lone cottage sits among undulating green hills under a golden sky. Inspired by folk art traditions and the romance of rural solitude.

projects.title: Moonlit Night
projects.description: A figure gazes upward at a crescent moon. The deep blues and warm gold create a contemplative mood — a meditation on wonder and the vastness of the night sky.

projects.title: Fresh Harvest
projects.description: A celebration of seasonal produce rendered in bold, graphic color. Eggplants, pomegranates, tomatoes and lemons tumble across a fresh mint background.
